questions.What surprised me today?: I realized how much I ve been stuck in planning without integration. I need to take action, not just document.
questions.What am I grateful for?: I am grateful for the opportunity to break this cycle and make integration automatic.
questions.What did I learn about myself?: I learned that I need to simplify before adding complexity, and that integration must come before analysis.
questions.What would I do differently?: I would focus on integration before analysis. I would make my habits so simple I can t avoid them.
questions.What am I looking forward to?: I am looking forward to breaking through to automatic integration and creating a self-improvement loop.
